milestone: RDL Structure Corpus and Resolver Validation v0.3

fixtures.name: Synthetic Inventory Detail
fixtures.description: Portrait report with one embedded dataset, one ungrouped tablix, a body title, and detail-only numeric displays.

provenance.author: Dylan Laewe
provenance.method: Create a blank report in a personally controlled Windows 11 VM, use Enter Data for the specified synthetic rows, add one detail tablix and body title, preview, save, close, reopen, preview, and copy the untouched saved bytes into the corpus.

datasets.name: InventoryData
datasets.purpose: Five fictional stock rows across invented warehouses; Units and UnitCost are numeric.

evidencePlan: top-level body textbox above the only tablix
single static value with no expression
largest and boldest body text
explicit descriptive report-item name
ambiguityRisks: static column labels must not be ranked as title candidates

evidencePlan: exact =Fields!UnitCost.Value expression
member of InventoryTable detail row
InventoryData dataset scope
static Unit Cost header excluded

anticipatedResolution.rationale: One prominent top-level title and one exact detail field display should resolve from general evidence.

editScenario.request: Change the report title to "Inventory Cost Review" and format UnitCost as currency with two decimal places.

fixtures.name: Synthetic Department Sales
fixtures.description: Grouped portrait report with department/detail hierarchy, subtotal, Grand Total, repeating headings, and Revenue at three scopes.

provenance.author: Dylan Laewe
provenance.method: Create in Report Builder from a blank report with Enter Data, add a Department parent group, detail rows, Add Total after the group, Add Total outside the group, repeating headings, and between-group page breaks; preview, save, close, reopen, preview, and contribute the saved bytes.

datasets.name: DepartmentSales
datasets.purpose: Eight fictional sales rows across four invented departments, with two rows per department.

evidencePlan: top-level static textbox above the grouped tablix
font prominence and width
no field or aggregate expression
explicit descriptive report-item name
ambiguityRisks: Department group header and subtotal labels are prominent static text
Grand Total label must not be selected as a title

evidencePlan: exact detail Fields!Revenue expression
Sum(Fields!Revenue.Value) beneath Department group scope
Sum(Fields!Revenue.Value) outside the Department group
tablix hierarchy and group membership distinguish aggregate scopes

anticipatedResolution.rationale: General expression, tablix membership, and hierarchy evidence should classify all three Revenue displays without a global target-count rule.

editScenario.request: Change the report title to "Department Revenue Review", make the title 20pt bold, and format Revenue as currency with no decimal places.

fixtures.name: Synthetic Regional Budget
fixtures.description: Two embedded datasets plus a visible Region parameter, parameter label/expression, one tablix, and a static body title.

provenance.author: Dylan Laewe
provenance.method: Create in Report Builder with two Enter Data datasets, define a RegionCode text parameter with available values from RegionLookup, filter the budget tablix by the parameter, preview multiple values, save, close, reopen, preview, and contribute the saved bytes.

datasets.name: BudgetData
datasets.purpose: Six fictional program budgets across three invented region codes.

datasets.name: RegionLookup
datasets.purpose: Three synthetic parameter labels; shared RegionCode and MetricValue names intentionally exercise dataset ambiguity evidence.

evidencePlan: top-level static textbox above parameter-driven tablix
font prominence and report-width placement
no field, parameter, or aggregate expression
ambiguityRisks: visible Region parameter prompt and parameter-value expressions must be excluded
static tablix headers must be excluded

evidencePlan: BudgetAmount is declared only by BudgetData
detail expression belongs to BudgetData tablix
aggregate expression is outside the detail member
RegionLookup fields and parameter labels are excluded

anticipatedResolution.rationale: BudgetAmount should resolve generically, but the duplicated RegionCode and MetricValue declarations will determine whether an explicit dataset-evidence profile is needed for future requests.

editScenario.request: Change the report title to "Regional Budget Outlook" and format BudgetAmount as currency with two decimal places.

fixtures.name: Synthetic Project Cost Landscape
fixtures.description: Landscape-authored report with title in the page header, a nested body rectangle, two tablixes, and alternate textbox names.

provenance.author: Dylan Laewe
provenance.method: Create in Report Builder as Letter landscape, place the title in Page Header, nest a detail tablix in a body rectangle, add a separate category-summary tablix, use deliberately noncanonical textbox names, preview, save, close, reopen, preview, and contribute the saved bytes.

datasets.name: ProjectCosts
datasets.purpose: Six fictional project-cost rows in three invented categories.

evidencePlan: prominent static page-header textbox
largest header font and report-width placement
no expression and no repetition within body hierarchy
explicit reviewed semantic role despite alternate item name
ambiguityRisks: current generic resolver excludes page-header titles
footer static text and body rectangle caption must not win
two tablixes create multiple nearby static labels

evidencePlan: exact Cost detail expression in nested detail tablix
Cost aggregate expression in separate category-summary tablix
tablix membership distinguishes detail from subtotal
static Cost labels excluded

anticipatedResolution.rationale: Field displays should resolve generically, while the page-header title is an intentional test of evidence ranking and may require a reviewed declarative title profile.

editScenario.request: Change the report title to "Project Cost Portfolio", switch the page to portrait, and format Cost as currency with no decimal places.
